title: pleopeltis scolopendrium
intro: Pleopeltis scolopendrium, also known as resurrection fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis scolopendrium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal preparations such as capsules and tinctures.
